content.text: In general, a normal function should be preferred over a friend function if it’s possible to do so with the existing member functions available (the less functions touching your classes’s internals, the better). However, don’t add additional access functions just to overload an operator as a normal function instead of a friend function!Best practicePrefer overloading operators as normal functions instead of friends if it’s possible to do so without adding additional functions.Next lesson21.4Overloading the I/O operatorsBack to table of contentsPrevious lesson21.2Overloading the arithmetic operators using friend functions
